notes: Preserves the dual-view layout and mantle proportions of the input but fails to resolve individual arms/tentacles into distinct appendages with sucker rings, leaving merged blob-like projections and noisy photo-trace dashes.
specific_issues: arms and tentacles merged into undifferentiated lobes rather than distinct individual appendages
no ring suckers indicated along arms
eye reduced to a tiny mark on side view, barely visible on dorsal view
photo-trace clutter — many short broken dashes inside the body instead of sparse stipple
fin contour on side view shows spurious pointed projections not present in photo
arm tips on dorsal view look like sharp beaks/wedges rather than tapered tentacles
stipple lacks the directional shading gradient seen in FAO plates
silhouette outline broken by stray dashes near the mantle/head junction
